# tsb_access_binding (Resource)

Manages the RBAC access bindings (AccessPolicy) of a TSB resource. Authoritative: it owns the complete set of bindings for the target resource; destroying it clears them (the policy object itself always exists).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `allow` (Attributes List) The set of role-to-subject bindings granted on the resource. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--allow))
- `fqn` (String) Fully-qualified name of the TSB resource these bindings apply to (e.g. organizations/myorg/tenants/mytenant).

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the access policy.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Fully-qualified name of the resource whose bindings are managed.

<a id="nestedatt--allow"></a>
### Nested Schema for `allow`

Required:

- `role` (String) FQN of the role being granted.
- `subjects` (Attributes List) The subjects the role is granted to. Set exactly one of user, team, or service_account per subject. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--allow--subjects))

<a id="nestedatt--allow--subjects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `allow.subjects`

Optional:

- `service_account` (String) Service account the role is granted to.
- `team` (String) Team the role is granted to.
- `user` (String) User the role is granted to.
